creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
gpart show

gpart show -l

zpool list -v

(In reply to Miroslav Lachman from comment #0)

> I did run zpool scrub - no issue found.

Still, I would be inclined to take a closer look at hardware. Check connections, et cetera. 

Nits: 

1) the OS is slightly outdated, should be at patch level 2, you might prefer to defer the update until after this bug report is triaged

2) probably in your kld_list, there's fuse; should be fusefs.
